LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL BANK MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS PURSUANT TO CCP SECTIONS 438(C)(1)(A). THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUOLT, ANGELIKA A $6,013.36 PRINCIPAL, $1,503.34 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,186.48 INTEREST, $296.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,999.18, SEE SCANNED DOC

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL BANK Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Pursuant To CCP Sections 438(C)(1)(A). Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 922-5939, specially appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in Open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
